For HEX values, enter the byte length, e: For HEX values, enter the byte length, e.g. 4 for an 8-character HEX RFID. Leave 0 to calculate automatically.
Creates automation states and allows the: Creates automation states and allows the adapter to control connector mode and maximum current from PV surplus.
Optional. Leave empty if this adapter ha: Optional. Leave empty if this adapter has only one connector.
State with current grid power in W. By d: State with current grid power in W. By default negative values mean feed-in/export.
Optional state with battery state of cha: Optional state with battery state of charge in percent.
PV automation switches the connector on: PV automation switches the connector on after this surplus is stable for the start delay.
PV automation switches the connector to: PV automation switches the connector to standby when surplus is at or below this value for the stop delay.
Standby delay after completed charging i: Standby delay after completed charging in seconds
When connector status is Finishing or Su: When connector status is Finishing or SuspendedEV, the adapter sets mode to Off after this delay.
Surplus between start and stop threshold: Surplus between start and stop thresholds
PV automation disabled by manual remote: PV automation disabled by manual remote stop
surplus between start and stop threshold: surplus between start and stop thresholds
